description: Single-file chain merging the wake sequence, Human Station/Hank setup, Melissa rescue handoff, first Vayrax battle, and return to the Human Station Habitat.

vayrax_territory_beacon_001.triggered_message: Vayrax territory marker has registered your wake signature.
vayrax_territory_beacon_001.message: Vayrax territory marker has registered your wake signature.

human_station_habitat_beacon_001.title: Human Station Habitat
human_station_habitat_beacon_001.message: Human habitat signal detected. Docking handshake unstable but readable.

melissa_active_beacon_001.title: Melissa Active Beacon
melissa_active_beacon_001.message: Melissa's personal beacon is active near the outer belt.

melissa_contact_listener_001.message: Disabled in single-chain opening event; Melissa contact is handled inside opening_wake_sequence_001.

melissa_nudawn_001.name: Melissa Nudawn
melissa_nudawn_001.message: My father sent you? Good. I need a Navigation Relay Coupler if I'm getting out of here.
dialogue_lines: I need a Navigation Relay Coupler if I'm getting out of here.
Here's the blueprint. Stay close and accept the handoff from your event panel.
There is plenty of iron around in the asteroids.

hank_marshall_001.name: Hank Marshall
hank_marshall_001.message: You made it back. Melissa too. Good. Now maybe we can talk about what you are.
dialogue_lines: You made it back. Melissa too. Good.
I owe you more answers than I have ready.
Stay near the hab. We need to figure out what woke inside that hull.

human_habitat_chapter_002_listener_001.title: Human Habitat Chapter 002 Listener
human_habitat_chapter_002_listener_001.triggered_message: Chapter 002 has been added to the Event panel.
human_habitat_chapter_002_listener_001.message: A quiet continuation hook waits at the Human Station Habitat. When the opening chain completes, Chapter 002 can be selected from the Event panel.

reward_packet.message: Opening chain complete. Human Station Habitat route cleared.

open_dev_welcome.objective_text: Review story beat: WELCOME TO FOREVER SPACE

on_enter.title: WELCOME TO FOREVER SPACE
on_enter.text:
[b]FOREVER SPACE[/b]

Dev Build: v10.6

Welcome to the current development build.

This version focuses on story-event flow, direct activation listeners, NPC quest routing, Battle V2, drones, autopilot, story popups, and authored world content.

Expect unfinished systems, placeholder balance, and active testing behavior.

Thank you for testing this early slice.

on_enter.title: MEMORY
on_enter.text: where.. is.. this

latch_boot_sequence.objective_text: Review story beat: L.A.T.C.H. BOOT SEQUENCE

on_enter.title: L.A.T.C.H. BOOT SEQUENCE
on_enter.text:
[b]L.A.T.C.H. BOOT SEQUENCE[/b]

Boot carrier detected.

Compatibility layer waking.

on_enter.title: SYSTEM INTERFACE
on_enter.text:
[b]SYSTEM POPUP[/b]

ERROR
MEMORY BLOCK UNAVAILABLE

ERROR
SENSORY ARRAY OFFLINE

ERROR
NAVIGATION SYSTEM OFFLINE

ERROR
IDENTITY PROFILE OFFLINE

---

[b]L.A.T.C.H. GRID RESPONSE FAILURE[/b]

LIVE ADAPTIVE TECHNOLOGY COUPLING HARDWARE

POWER ROUTING CELL .......... OFFLINE
SENSOR ARRAY CELL ........... OFFLINE
NAVIGATION CELL ............. OFFLINE
COMMUNICATION CELL .......... OFFLINE
COMBAT RESPONSE CELL ........ DEGRADED
EXTERNAL INTERFACE CELL ..... CORRUPTED
IDENTITY TETHER CELL ........ MISSING
PERSONAL MEMORY BANK ........ REMOVED

---

SYSTEM POPUP

PING
Something is happening.

---

SYSTEM POPUP

INTERNAL CASING LOCK HAS BEEN DISABLED

---

[b]THOUGHT QUERY[/b]

Casing?

---

SYSTEM POPUP

CASING
Protective external shell.

REFERENCE FOUND
PERSONAL MEMORY LINK: UNAVAILABLE

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
I don't understand.

Am I dreaming?

on_enter.title: SYSTEM POPUP
on_enter.text:
[b]SYSTEM POPUP[/b]

PING
MEMORY CORE HAS BEEN REMOVED

---

[b]CELL REMOVAL DETECTED[/b]

POWER ROUTING CELL .......... REMOVED
SENSOR ARRAY CELL ........... REMOVED
NAVIGATION CELL ............. REMOVED
COMMUNICATION CELL .......... REMOVED

PERSONAL MEMORY BANK ........ REMOVED

on_enter.title: THOUGHT QUERY
on_enter.text:
I need my memories.

Why?

Why do I need them?

on_enter.title: SYSTEM POPUP
on_enter.text:
[b]SYSTEM POPUP[/b]

PING
INSTALLING MEMORY CORE DATA FROM FRESH CELL
STATUS: ACCEPTED

PING
INSTALLING SENSOR ARRAY DATA FROM FRESH CELL
STATUS: ACCEPTED

---

[b]L.A.T.C.H. COMPATIBILITY LAYER REBUILDING[/b]

FOREIGN CELL DATA ACCEPTED

POWER ROUTING CELL .......... ONLINE
SENSOR ARRAY CELL ........... ONLINE
NAVIGATION CELL ............. ONLINE
COMMUNICATION CELL .......... ONLINE
COMBAT RESPONSE CELL ........ DEGRADED BUT RESPONSIVE
EXTERNAL INTERFACE CELL ..... STABILIZED
IDENTITY TETHER CELL ........ CLEAN REPLACEMENT
PERSONAL MEMORY BANK ........ EMPTY

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
I can see.

I don't understand, but I know I'm in space.

I can't seem to do anything.

But I sense I am not alone.

Something is... repairing me...

on_enter.title: AUDIO POPUP
on_enter.text:
SOURCE: EXTERNAL HUMAN COMMS
SIGNAL QUALITY: DAMAGED
VOICE ID: UNKNOWN

"Hey, anyone home in there?"

"You copy?"

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
Hello..

Copy what?

on_enter.title: AUDIO POPUP
on_enter.text:
SOURCE: HANK
SIGNAL QUALITY: CLEARING

"Well ok."

"Didn't think you'd actually boot, huh."

"Haha."

"Don't kill me is all I ask."

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
Why would I kill you?

I'm very confused.

I don't think I know who I am or what I'm doing out here.

on_enter.title: AUDIO POPUP
on_enter.text:
SOURCE: HANK
SIGNAL QUALITY: CLEAR

"I think I might know what's going on with you."

"I think you should come with me."

"You should be able to use your Auto Pilot function."

"I'm going to pass you a location."

"Meet me here and maybe we can clear up your memory problems."

travel_to_human_habitat_beacon.objective_text: Hank transmitted a habitat location. Use the Event panel Auto Pilot route to travel to the Human Station Habitat.

on_enter.title: AUTO PILOT TARGET RECEIVED
on_enter.text: Hank transmitted a habitat location. Use the Event panel Auto Pilot route to travel there.

station_arrival_checkin.objective_text: Review story beat: HUMAN STATION HABITAT

on_enter.title: HUMAN STATION HABITAT
on_enter.text:
[b]STATION RELAY[/b]

"Hank, docking channel open."

"Where have you been?"

---

[b]HANK[/b]

"Long story."

"Got a guest."

---

[b]STATION RELAY[/b]

"You don't bring guests."

---

[b]HANK[/b]

"I know."

on_enter.title: STATION RELAY
on_enter.text:
[b]STATION RELAY[/b]

"Hank..."

"Melissa missed her check-in."

"Her beacon is still active, but she never made dock cycle."

"Last ping is holding near the outer belt."

on_enter.title: AUDIO POPUP
on_enter.text:
SOURCE: HANK
SIGNAL QUALITY: CLEAR

"Melissa."

"Girl's gonna be the death of me."

"She does this. Pushes too far, swears she has it handled, then makes everyone else sweat over the silence."

"I was going to help sort out your memory problems first, but that plan has to wait."

"Your warp signature is stronger than mine. A lot stronger."

"If her beacon is active, you can get there faster than I can."

"I hate asking this after dragging you here half-awake, but I need your help."

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
I don't understand all of this.

But someone needs help.

So I will help.

on_enter.title: SYSTEM POPUP
on_enter.text:
[b]BEACON TARGET RECEIVED[/b]

TARGET NAME: Melissa Active Beacon
TARGET TYPE: Human Personal Beacon
STATUS: Active
CHECK-IN STATUS: Missed
DOCK CYCLE: Missed
ROUTE STATUS: AVAILABLE

travel_to_melissa_beacon.objective_text: Melissa's active beacon is now the event target. Use the Event panel Auto Pilot route to travel there.

on_enter.title: AUTO PILOT TARGET RECEIVED
on_enter.text: Melissa's active beacon is now the event target. Use the Event panel Auto Pilot route to travel there.

melissa_beacon_reached.objective_text: Review story beat: MELISSA ACTIVE BEACON

on_enter.title: MELISSA ACTIVE BEACON
on_enter.text:
Melissa's active beacon reached.

Local scan is waking up around the outer belt.

on_enter.title: SCAN NOTICE
on_enter.text:
[b]SCAN UPDATE[/b]

Your scan has detected several asteroids.

Their information can be accessed via the Live Radar.

Asteroids are orange.

Clicking an active node relays directly to your personal log.

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
That's really great. Thanks.

But I need to focus on helping Melissa.

I should be able to link-call her from here...

go_talk_to_melissa.objective_text: Get close enough to Melissa to receive her blueprint handoff.

on_arrival.title: MELISSA
on_arrival.text:
[b]MELISSA[/b]

"My father sent you?"

"Good."

"I need a Navigation Relay Coupler if I'm getting out of here."

"Here's the blueprint."

"Move in close — 30 units or less — and accept the handoff from your Event panel."

on_enter.title: ACCEPT HANDOFF
on_enter.text:
Some NPCs can hand off items, blueprints, or mission data.

You must be within interaction range to accept the handoff.

Use the event action button when you are ready.

accept_melissa_repair_handoff.objective_text: Move within 30 units of Melissa and press ACCEPT in the Event panel to receive the Navigation Relay Coupler blueprint.

on_enter.title: BLUEPRINT RECEIVED
on_enter.text:
[b]BLUEPRINT RECEIVED[/b]

Navigation Relay Coupler Blueprint added to your inventory.

You can now gather materials and fabricate the coupler for Melissa.

npc_dialogue_lines: I'll trust you to help me out.
If you can build that Navigation Relay Coupler, I can get this ship moving again.
on_enter.message: OK. I'll trust you to help me out.

on_enter.title: SYSTEM INTERFACE
on_enter.text:
[b]NEW TASK DETECTED[/b]

BLUEPRINT REQUIREMENTS INCOMPLETE

[b]SUGGESTED ACTIONS[/b]

1. Navigate to nearby resource nodes.

2. Scan objects to determine composition.

3. Mine required resources.

4. Return resources for fabrication.

---

[b]NAVIGATION[/b]

The Auto Pilot can route to known targets.

---

[b]SCAN[/b]

Scanning reveals information about objects, contacts, and resources.

---

[b]MINING[/b]

Asteroids may contain usable materials.

Required materials can be collected and stored in inventory.

on_enter.title: SYSTEM INTERFACE
on_enter.text:
[b]BLUEPRINT INFORMATION[/b]

Blueprints contain fabrication instructions.

Required materials must be present before fabrication can begin.

When sufficient materials are available:

1. Open the Crafting Interface.

2. Select a known blueprint.

3. Verify required materials.

4. Fabricate the item.

Fabricated items may be delivered to NPCs, installed, traded, or stored.

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
That's strange.

I don't remember learning any of this.

But I understand it.

return_to_melissa_with_coupler.objective_text: Fabricate a Navigation Relay Coupler, then deliver it to Melissa.

on_enter.title: BUILD AND RETURN
on_enter.text: If you can build the Navigation Relay Coupler, Melissa can get moving again. Bring it back when it is finished.

on_enter.title: MELISSA
on_enter.text:
[b]MELISSA[/b]

"Damn."

"We have a bogey inbound."

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text: A.. bogey?

on_enter.title: MELISSA
on_enter.text:
[b]MELISSA[/b]

"This is Vayrax space."

"Humans are not meant to have presence here."

"Tell me you can fight."

vayrax_claim_drone_warning.objective_text: Review story beat: VAYRAX CLAIM DRONE

on_enter.title: VAYRAX CLAIM DRONE
on_enter.text:
[b]UNAUTHORIZED VESSEL[/b]

Remain where you are.

I will now destroy you.

Comply.

on_enter.title: BATTLE WARNING
on_enter.text: You are about to enter a battle.

on_enter.title: PLAYER RESPONSE
on_enter.text:
Wait, what?

I don't know how to fight.

on_enter.title: SYSTEM INTERFACE
on_enter.text:
[b]L.A.T.C.H. RESPONSE[/b]

You are a L.A.T.C.H. ship.

You are made for battle.

---

[b]BASIC BATTLE RUNDOWN[/b]

Primary weapons are reliable direct attacks.

Secondary weapons may use ammunition or stronger firing lanes.

Shields reduce incoming damage while powered.

Consumables can repair, recharge, or create tactical effects.

Enemies may carry weapons, shields, consumables, behavior profiles, and rewards.

Survive the enemy action cycle.

Disable the hostile vessel.

on_enter.title: MELISSA
on_enter.text:
[b]MELISSA[/b]

"You actually won."

"Okay... wow."

"Thank you."

"I'll meet you back at the hab."

"We have a lot to discuss."

return_to_human_habitat.objective_text: Return to the Human Station Habitat. Melissa and Hank will be waiting there.

updates.name: Melissa Nudawn
updates.message: I made it back to the hab. Thanks for not leaving me out there.
dialogue_lines: I made it back to the hab.
Thanks for not leaving me out there.
Dad is going to pretend he was not worried. He absolutely was.
We still need to talk about what you are.

talk_meta.message: I made it back to the hab. Thanks for not leaving me out there.
npc_dialogue_lines: I made it back to the hab.
Thanks for not leaving me out there.
Dad is going to pretend he was not worried. He absolutely was.
We still need to talk about what you are.

on_enter.title: RETURN TO HABITATION
on_enter.text: Return to the Human Station Habitat. Melissa and Hank will be waiting there.

on_arrival.message: Human Station Habitat reached. Melissa and Hank are now at the hab.

updates.name: Melissa Nudawn
updates.message: I made it back to the hab. Thanks for not leaving me out there.
dialogue_lines: I made it back to the hab.
Thanks for not leaving me out there.
Dad is going to pretend he was not worried. He absolutely was.
We still need to talk about what you are.

melissa_contact_complete.objective_text: Meet Melissa and Hank at the Human Station Habitat, then complete the opening rescue chain. Chapter 002 has already been seeded and can be selected from the Event panel after completion.

on_enter.title: STORY HANDOFF
on_enter.text:
[b]STORY HANDOFF[/b]

Opening Wake Sequence is ready to close.

Chapter 002 has already been seeded at the Human Station Habitat as an available continuation event.

Press COMPLETE to close Chapter 001 normally, then select Chapter 002 from the Event panel.
